      "features/fines.feature:18: Then the response includes unpaid_fines_cents of 350"
    ],

      "features/manage.feature:8: When the librarian creates a book with title \"The Hobbit\", author \"J.R.R. Tolkien\", ISBN \"978-0547928227\", and 4 copies"
    ]
  },
  "final_score": 3,
  "confidence": "high"
}
